message:
No MCP servers configured.

Add servers to .mcp.json, .gsd/mcp.json, or $GSD_HOME/mcp.json (default: ~/.gsd/mcp.json) to enable MCP integrations.
Tip: run /gsd mcp init . to write the local GSD workflow MCP config.
See: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/quickstart

GSD — Get Shit Done

QUICK START
  /gsd start <tpl>   Start a workflow template
  /gsd               Open the state-aware home menu
  /gsd auto          Run all queued units continuously
  /gsd pause         Pause auto-mode
  /gsd stop          Stop auto-mode gracefully

VISIBILITY
  /gsd status         Interactive 10-tab TUI  (Ctrl+Alt+G / Ctrl+Shift+G)
  /gsd parallel watch Parallel monitor  (Ctrl+Alt+P)
  /gsd notifications  Notification history  (Ctrl+Alt+N / Ctrl+Shift+N)
  /gsd visualize  …

Usage: /gsd start <template> [description]

Templates:
  bugfix          Triage → fix → verify → ship
  small-feature   Scope → plan → implement → verify
  spike           Scope → research → synthesize
  hotfix          Fix → ship (minimal ceremony)
  refactor        Inventory → plan → migrate → verify
  security-audit  Scan → triage → remediate → re-scan
  dep-upgrade     Assess → upgrade → fix → verify
  full-project    Complete GSD with full ceremony

Examples:
  /gsd start bugfix fix login b…
Web search: Set BRAVE_API_KEY or use an Anthropic model for built-in search
